experience.description: Developed and maintained full-stack e-commerce web applications and led technology migrations.
responsibilities: Developed and maintained full-stack e-commerce web applications using Java, React (TypeScript), Spring Boot, and REST APIs hosted on Azure App Service, with unit and integration testing via JUnit
Led a team of 3 engineers to migrate the frontend from Angular to React framework, building the application from the ground up, resulting in a 45% reduction in the build size of web components
Improved API response time by optimizing backend processing through the implementation of Azure Cache for Redis and multithreading, cutting latency by 66%; monitored performance using Dynatrace

Built and shipped a reusable micro-frontend component library (UIaaS) and supporting REST APIs for a product search platform, delivering advanced filtering, pagination, add-to-cart, and bulk document download across a catalog of 500+ products
Eliminated 12+ critical XSS (Cross-Site Scripting) vulnerabilities by implementing ESAPI (Enterprise Security API) in alignment with OWASP standards, significantly reducing security risk exposure

achievements.description: Reduction in build size after Angular to React migration
Reduction in API latency through Redis caching and multithreading
Critical XSS vulnerabilities eliminated via ESAPI
Products supported in UIaaS component library

experience.description: Teaching Assistant for Software Engineering and Programming in C++ courses.
responsibilities: Developed full-stack application for coursework in the MERN (MongoDB, Express, React/TypeScript with Redux, Node.js) stack and built Jest and Cypress test suites, achieving 95% code coverage
Implemented CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and Docker for containerized and efficient deployment

Guided 100+ students during office hours and led 4 project teams through Agile sprint planning, sprint reviews, and user story grooming using Scrum methodologies, resulting in a 100% on-time project delivery rate
Led hands-on sessions demonstrating OpenCV techniques using C++ for image classification and manipulation; guided 100+ students in modern C++ concepts and graded weekly programming assignments

achievements.description: Code coverage achieved with Jest and Cypress test suites
On-time project delivery rate across 4 Agile project teams
Students guided through office hours and C++ sessions
